snp5.14:1.1: To the one in jhāna— seated, dustless, passionless,
snp5.14:1.4: gone to the beyond of all phenomena—
snp5.14:1.5: I’ve come with a desire for a question.
snp5.14:1.6: Tell me the gnosis of emancipation,
snp5.14:2.1:
The Buddha:
The abandoning both of sensual desires,
snp5.14:3.2: with inspection of mental qualities swift in the forefront:
snp5.14:3.3: That I call the gnosis of emancipation,
snp5.14:3.4:
the breaking open of ignorance.
Udaya:
snp5.14:4.1: With what is the world fettered?
snp5.14:4.4:
is there said to be unbinding?
The Buddha:
snp5.14:5.4:
is there said to be unbinding.
Udaya:
snp5.14:6.2: does one bring consciousness to a halt?
snp5.14:6.3: We’ve come to ask the Blessed One.
snp5.14:6.4:
Let us hear your words.
The Buddha:
snp5.14:7.2: Not relishing feeling, inside or out:
snp5.14:7.3: One living mindful in this way
